adr_entry: No new architectural patterns, shared interfaces, or dependency changes. The implementation plumbs an existing `QualityProfile.dofStrength` value (already computed per tier: 0.0/0.4/0.6) into six point-based system configs via an optional `dofStrength?: number` field with `?? 0.6` fallback. This is a mechanical config-threading change through established factory/config patterns. Bloom post-processing and DoF focus uniforms are already active across all modes — no render pipeline changes needed.
